issues.sample: WHILE DRIVING IN THE FREEWAY TRYING TO EXITING ALL OF SUDDEN I FEEL MY STEERING WHEEL MOVE ITSELF TOWARD THE CURVE AND TRYING TO BREAK AND STEER ITSELF AT THE SAME CAUSING MY VEHICLE TO CRASH AGAIST THE CURVE AND GO TO ON TOP MAKING ME LOOSE CONTROL OF STEERING WHEEL AND CRASHING

Sudden HARD braking when a vehicle is passing  Windows that do not close properly and are then prone to sudden slamming shut (will eventually shatter)  Have been in to have these repaired only to have them not repaired and even refused due to dealer fear of not being reimbursed

narrative.headline: What 2024 Honda Hr-V owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 106 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (48% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
